allow: Bash(ffmpeg -loop 1 -i "CVscreenshot.png" -i "VampireKiller_v5 closest yet.wav" -c:v libx264 -tune stillimage -c:a aac -b:a 192k -pix_fmt yuv420p -shortest -movflags +faststart "VampireKiller_v5.mp4")

Bash(ffmpeg -loop 1 -i "CVscreenshot.png" -i "VampireKiller_v5 closest yet.wav" -c:v libx264 -tune stillimage -c:a aac -b:a 192k -pix_fmt yuv420p -vf "pad=ceil\(iw/2\)*2:ceil\(ih/2\)*2" -shortest -movflags +faststart "VampireKiller_v5.mp4")

Bash(ffmpeg -y -loop 1 -i "CVscreenshot.png" -i "VampireKiller_v5 closest yet.wav" -c:v libx264 -tune stillimage -c:a aac -b:a 192k -pix_fmt yuv420p -vf "pad=ceil\(iw/2\)*2:ceil\(ih/2\)*2" -shortest -movflags +faststart "VampireKiller_v5.mp4")
